sections.evidence_question: Why does the existing white-box predictor succeed on the emulator but fail on real B200 FlashAttention-4 measurements, and what transfer gaps must be closed?
sections.parent_claim: The existing white-box predictor (fa4-b200-whitebox-occupancy-tma-l2-precision-v1) achieves the useful-improvement threshold when validated against real B200 FlashAttention-4 forward-pass measurements.
sections.stop_condition: Stop when the dominant transfer gaps are identified and a concrete next experiment or model change is justified.

summary: Analysis context for interpreting the real-hardware refutation of the FA4 B200 predictor.
title: Analysis Context Brief: Real-Hardware Transfer Gap
